_readme: Банк УТВЕРЖДЁННЫХ визуальных стилей владельца — каталог для art_director.py (см. docs/ARCHITECTURE или комментарий в art_director.py про STYLE_BANK). Каждый стиль — выжимка ЛУЧШЕГО рецепта этого стиля из docs/*_RECIPES.json/*_STYLES*.json/JJK_TEN.json. essence/text_treatment — на английском (вшиваются в промпт художника), остальные поля — служебные (ротация/подбор по теме). Стили можно миксовать (style_mix) по правилу владельца, см. mixing.allowed ниже. Стиль id='09_ring_medallion' — ГИБРИД: кольцевой текст рисует КОД (typography/typography_v3), в САМ художественный промпт кольцо ВСТАВЛЯЕТСЯ ПУСТЫМ (без слов) — см. hybrid_ring_text=true и art_director._style_bank_prompt_block().

mixing.rule: Владелец разрешает миксовать до 2 стилей на один дизайн (style_mix), когда тема реально просит совмещения (например geometry ар-деко + японская гравюра). Claude сам решает через поле style_mix в JSON-ответе — см. art_director.py.

styles.essence: The figure is fully framed by an ornamental baroque border of thin gilded scrollwork and flame/floral motifs running along the edge of the frame, engraved like a metal plate — rich blackletter-meets-antiqua display lettering in glossy metallic gold sits above the figure's head, following the curvature of the frame's top edge, never overlapping the figure. Deep saturated jewel-tone palette (blood red, antique gold, aged bronze, near-black charcoal) with heavy engraved shading.
styles.text_treatment: Main phrase in ornate blackletter/antiqua display face, glossy metallic gold gradient fill with thin engraved bronze outline and soft dark drop shadow, arced along the top frame edge above the head. Vertical kanji/katakana column (if character has a name) placed fully inside the frame margin, outside the figure's silhouette, matching gold treatment.
styles.palette_rule: Deep jewel tones: blood red / antique gold / aged bronze / near-black charcoal — text always gold, never a flat basic color.
constraints: рамка-вставка ДЕКОРАТИВНАЯ, не должна упираться в край кадра — оставляй широкие хромакей-поля СНАРУЖИ орнамента
мин. кегль 0.075
SINGLE FIGURE
ANATOMY: точное число конечностей

styles.essence: The figure stands centered in a static frontal or three-quarter pose, fully enclosed by a thin decorative circular medallion ring/border (like a coin or guild crest) running at an even radial distance around the whole figure — classic emblem/badge composition, clean anime cel-shading figure inside, ornamental notches or small emblem glyphs marking the ring's seam at the top.
styles.text_treatment: hybrid_ring_text: the decorative ring itself is drawn EMPTY in the image generation — no letters anywhere on the ring in the art prompt. The ring TEXT (character name / phrase running along the circumference) is added AFTERWARD by CODE (typography.py / typography_v3.py ring-text renderer), never by the image model. The art prompt must explicitly describe the ring as a plain metal/enamel band with only ornamental notches, NOT request any lettering on it.
styles.palette_rule: Aged gold ring + matte black or deep color figure fill + one accent color for a small emblem glyph at the ring seam.
constraints: в художественном промпте кольцо ЯВНО описывается как ПУСТОЕ (без текста) — иначе модель дублирует текст, который потом накладывает код
фигура полностью внутри кольца с равными полями
SINGLE FIGURE
мин. кегль кода-типографики по кольцу 0.058 (см. typography_v3)

styles.essence: Heroic socialist-realism poster pose: figure stands wide-legged on a pedestal/rubble, one arm raised overhead in a clenched fist, the other doing a signature gesture, behind them a large graphic disc of a rising sun with sharp straight sunburst rays and a bold flat silhouette motif (animal/summon/symbol of the character) inside the disc. Flat saturated poster inks, no gradients, light print-grain texture and slight colour-plate misregistration like old lithography, dramatic low-angle shot.
styles.text_treatment: Main slogan in a heavy geometric propaganda-poster slab face, flat fill with a thin contrasting keyline, set in a straight horizontal band across the upper third in front of the sun rays. Secondary line in a smaller matching slab weight stacked below. Vertical kanji/katakana name column in the lower margin beside the leg, stamp-style.
styles.palette_rule: Warm poster duotone (burnt orange/crimson/cream) OR cold inverted variant (black/crimson) depending on character tone — always flat, no gradients except rain/mist hatching if thematically justified.
constraints: текст ВСЕГДА на топслое поверх лучей, лучи видны только вокруг букв
ровно один силуэт-мотив внутри диска солнца
SINGLE FIGURE
мин. кегль главной строки 0.10-0.135

styles.essence: The static wide-legged pedestal pose is replaced by a hard diagonal dynamic composition (15-20 degree tilt): figure frozen mid-lunge/mid-punch along the diagonal axis, aura/hair/effects swept along the same diagonal, the sun-disc pushed off-center into a corner, partially cropped, rays radiating at the same diagonal tilt. Constructivist Rodchenko/Klutsis energy crossed with the propaganda-poster base.
styles.text_treatment: Main phrase built as stepped/cascading diagonal text-plates (one word per plate) tilted at the same angle as the figure's dash, OR a single bold diagonal wordmark running parallel to the main colour band. Vertical name column kept perfectly UPRIGHT (not tilted) as a stable anchor.
styles.palette_rule: Same propaganda duotone base, with the diagonal bands themselves as a strong flat colour block (e.g. cobalt blue / golden-yellow).
constraints: весь текст и фон наклонены на ЕДИНЫЙ угол 15-20 градусов, кроме вертикальной колонки имени
SINGLE FIGURE
чёткая диагональ читается по всей композиции

styles.essence: Figure marches straight toward the viewer along the exact center axis, striding hard so a boot appears to break the bottom frame edge. Instead of a full sun-disc, only the upper HALF of a large sun sits low at a horizon line, bisected by silhouetted rooftops/rubble; sunburst rays fan out filling the whole upper background, converging low behind the striding legs — a 'marching crowd toward camera' feeling.
styles.text_treatment: Main phrase set in a wide gentle ARC following the curved upper edge of the canvas (arched banner, each letter tangent to the arc), peaking above the figure's head. Secondary line sits as a straight horizontal band along the horizon/bisecting edge, separated from the main line. Vertical name column mirrored to balance the arc.
styles.palette_rule: Warm advancing tones (blood-orange, golden-yellow, cream, charcoal) — horizon line always reads as a hard edge between rays above and dark silhouette below.
constraints: ровно ОДНА арка текста сверху + ОДНА горизонтальная строка на линии горизонта — не дублировать фразу
SINGLE FIGURE
мин. кегль главной арки 0.10

styles.essence: Classic Japanese woodblock print (mokuhanga, Hokusai/Kuniyoshi school): flat poster-ink layers with visible wood-grain texture running through every large colour field, thick carved black contour line, stylised claw-like wave/cloud curls, slight colour-plate offset misregistration mimicking hand-printing. A monumental Hokusai-style wave often curls above the figure without ever overlapping the face. Small round vermilion hanko seal cartouches sit in the upper corners.
styles.text_treatment: Main phrase inside a long horizontal woodblock-printed title cartouche (ruled panel, aged-parchment cream fill, thick carved black double-rule border), phrase in a bold hand-carved brush-caps face, sumi-ink black fill. Name column as a traditional red hanko-stamp vertical cartouche beside the trailing leg/hem.
styles.palette_rule: Indigo blue, sumi-ink black, vermilion red, aged parchment cream + one character-specific accent (steel-grey blades, sage-green bamboo etc.) — check chroma_note for green-heavy characters (use blue chroma).
constraints: SINGLE FIGURE, one clear three-quarter view only
волна НЕ перекрывает лицо персонажа
мин. кегль основной строки 0.075-0.09
проверить хромакей: если у персонажа зелёные волосы/акценты — chroma=blue

styles.essence: Gothic church stained-glass window fills the entire canvas: thick black lead-came outline traces every colour segment exactly like real leaded glass, flat saturated semi-transparent segment fills as if lit from behind, no soft shading. Figure stands centered beneath a pointed gothic arch with a small tracery rose-medallion above the head; often a light/dark duality splits the background down the vertical centerline (cool half vs warm half).
styles.text_treatment: Main phrase set inside a narrow horizontal leaded-glass banner-segment spanning the arch width, same thick black lead-came border, phrase in a tall gothic blackletter display face, luminous glass-colour fill with black lead outline around every letter. Name column as a small leaded glass panel in the lower margin, same lead-outline treatment.
styles.palette_rule: Deep saturated glass jewel-tones (cobalt/emerald/crimson/amber/gold) split light/dark across the centerline — WATCH for emerald-green glass segments, usually forces chroma=blue.
constraints: SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only
lead-came контур обязателен на КАЖДОМ цветовом сегменте, включая текст
мин. кегль баннера 0.06-0.075
почти всегда chroma=blue из-за зелёного стекла — проверять индивидуально

styles.essence: Strictly mirror-symmetrical Gatsby/Chrysler-Building composition: tall geometric golden sunburst fan-rays radiate from directly behind the figure's head/shoulders filling the whole upper background (stepped rays alternating bright gold and deep bronze), a thin elegant rectangular deco frame-line with stepped corner ornaments borders the canvas edge. Figure poised, elegant, centered.
styles.text_treatment: Main phrase inside a slim horizontal rectangular gold plaque beneath the figure, flat deep-bronze fill with a thin bright-gold stepped deco border and matching stepped corner motifs, phrase in an elegant thin geometric deco capitals face with wide letter-tracking, solid bright metallic gold fill. Name column as a gold stamp-style vertical column beside the deco frame-line.
styles.palette_rule: Bright metallic gold + deep bronze + one dark base colour (matte black/deep colour garment) + cream ivory field — no additional loud accents, luxury restraint.
constraints: строгая зеркальная симметрия по вертикальной оси — обязательна
SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only
мин. кегль плашки 0.08

styles.essence: Tall rectangular tarot-arcana card frame fills the canvas: a thick ornate engraved border of interlocking vine-and-star (or baroque acanthus-gold, if mixed) filigree runs around all four edges, small mystical star/crescent-moon/infinity glyphs mark the four corners outside the silhouette, a star-dusted deep-indigo sky with a single large pale moon glows behind the figure without overlapping the face. Calm, composed, mystical but NOT dark/gothic — restrained occult elegance.
styles.text_treatment: Main arcana-name phrase set inside a narrow horizontal engraved title plaque directly below the frame's top border (traditional arcana-name position), aged parchment-cream plaque with a thin double-rule engraved border, phrase in an elegant engraved serif display face with small terminal flourishes, deep indigo-black fill. A small roman-numeral arcana-number plaque sits below the card's bottom border, pale gold fill. Name column as a fine engraved gold vertical column in the lower margin.
styles.palette_rule: Deep indigo night-blue, ivory white, pale gold filigree, soft lavender-grey shading, parchment cream plaque — calm mystic, never blood/gore tones.
constraints: SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only
мин. кегль заголовочной плашки 0.08-0.09
роман-номер аркана — отдельный маленький блок, не путать с главной фразой

styles.essence: Formal heraldic shield fills the canvas: the shield is divided into four quarters by a thin engraved cross-line, two opposing quarters in one flat colour field, the other two in a contrasting flat field (classic heraldic quartering). A pair of symmetrical ornaments (laurel branches, OR crossed ceremonial polearms/weapons for a more martial variant) curve along the outer edges meeting near the bottom point, a five-pointed star sits centered above the shield's top edge, a ribbon-scroll banner sweeps beneath the shield's bottom point.
styles.text_treatment: Main motto phrase set on the ribbon-scroll banner beneath the shield's point, flat colour fill with a thin metallic (gold or silver) double-rule border, phrase in a bold engraved heraldic serif face with subtle small-caps flourish, solid metallic fill. Name column as a metallic engraved vertical column beside the trailing leg, outside the shield.
styles.palette_rule: Two contrasting heraldic quarter-colours (e.g. deep crimson + cream, or crimson + charcoal-navy) + one metallic trim (pale gold or silver) — restrained, no more than 3 flat colours plus metallic.
constraints: ровно 4 геральдические четверти щита с чёткой границей
SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal three-quarter view only
мин. кегль девиза-ленты 0.075-0.09

styles.essence: Chunky 16-bit pixel-art sprite occupying only ~55% of frame height (reduced scale to leave room for UI chrome), rendered entirely in large visible square pixel blocks with a limited retro colour count and hard stair-step edges on every diagonal, simple idle/taunt pose. Above the sprite a thin pixel-bordered HP-bar (or two, for a versus-screen variant) spans the top edge; below the sprite a rectangular pixel-bordered dialogue box with a small triangular pointer anchors the bottom edge.
styles.text_treatment: Main phrase set INSIDE the bottom-anchored pixel dialogue box, flat white fill with a hard black double-pixel outline, phrase in a blocky monospace pixel-font face, solid black fill. Optional score/HP readout in the upper corner in the same pixel-font style. Name column as a pixel-font vertical column beside the HP-bar, outside the sprite.
styles.palette_rule: Limited retro palette matching the character's canon colours in flat blocks — avoid gradients entirely, hard pixel edges only. Watch for a canonically green HP-bar/UI element forcing chroma=blue.
constraints: фигура-спрайт ~55% высоты кадра (НЕ обычные 75-80%) — место под UI обязательно
SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal view only
мин. кегль диалогового текста 0.07

styles.essence: A large flat-colour diamond road-warning sign (safety-yellow enamel) fills most of the canvas, a bold black stencil-cut icon graphic (matching the character's signature weapon/power) sits printed flat behind the silhouette within the diamond, the enamel surface carries visible scratched/chipped metal texture and bolt-holes at the four corners. A handful of small flat sticker-bomb graphics (simple shapes, no extra readable words) are scattered loosely around the outside edge of the diamond.
styles.text_treatment: Main phrase on a bold horizontal stencil-cut warning banner beneath the figure, matte-black stencil plate fill with scratched-metal texture, phrase in a heavy industrial stencil face, solid safety-yellow fill matching the enamel. Optional secondary phrase on a small separate sticker-bomb tag outside the diamond. Name column as a matte-black stencil vertical column beside the figure, outside the silhouette.
styles.palette_rule: Safety-yellow enamel + matte black stencil + one small safety-orange sticker accent — bold industrial contrast, no soft tones.
constraints: SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal three-quarter view only
мин. кегль главного баннера 0.085-0.09
иконка внутри ромба ровно одна, без лишних деталей

styles.essence: Aggressive metal-album cover composition filling the canvas: jagged lightning-bolt graphic streaks radiate outward from behind the figure's shoulders/weapon but stop well INSET from the frame corners (never touching them), sharp thorned-spike ornament shapes frame the lower edge beneath the feet while staying INSET from the very bottom border, flat stormy charcoal-black background with faint distant lightning-flash streaks, a thin engraved metallic border sits INSET a clear margin away from the true canvas edge (not touching it) — a flat, undecorated chroma-key strip must remain visible all around the outer edge of the canvas, outside this metallic border.
styles.text_treatment: Main phrase (band/title-style) as a huge aggressive metal-band display lettering block spanning the canvas width beneath the figure, letterforms built from sharp angular strokes with small thorn-spike/lightning-crack details on the stroke edges while staying fully legible, solid gunmetal-silver fill with a thin coloured bevel edge. Optional smaller subtitle line beneath. Name column as a gunmetal-silver vertical column beside the shoulder/weapon.
styles.palette_rule: Matte black + gunmetal silver + ONE accent colour (crimson or steel-blue) — no glowing runes/occult symbols unless the theme explicitly calls for it (safety: keep it heroic, not demonic).
constraints: SINGLE FIGURE, one clear frontal three-quarter view only
мин. кегль главного слова 0.1-0.13
формулировки нейтрально-героические, без demon/curse/blood в тексте если тема не хоррор

styles.essence: Reproduce the viral internet meme in its INSTANTLY RECOGNISABLE original form — the exact character/creature/image and composition that actually went viral, faithful to the source picture everyone has already seen. This is a RECOGNITION-first style, not an art-direction style: keep the original colours, the original pose and expression, and crucially the original drawing simplicity — if the meme is deliberately crude, low-effort, MS-Paint, childlike or lo-fi, PRESERVE that crudeness exactly (do NOT 'upgrade' it into polished art, that kills the recognition). The meme subject is large and centered, filling most of the frame, on a clean flat chroma-key background with nothing else competing. The goal is that an ANICLOT customer who saw the meme on TikTok/VK recognises it in under one second. If the meme has a canonical caption/phrase, reproduce it faithfully; if the meme is silent, leave it clean.
styles.text_treatment: If the meme has a well-known canonical caption, reproduce it as-is in a plain readable font close to how it appears in the original (top-and-bottom impact-caption layout for classic image-macro memes, or the meme's own lettering if it has a signature look). If the original has no text, leave it textless OR add one short punchy caption in a clean neutral font at the bottom — never wrap the meme in ornate decorative typography, that fights the recognition. Keep any text large and legible for print.
styles.palette_rule: Use the meme's ACTUAL original colours — do not recolour, do not restyle the palette. Faithfulness to the source over aesthetic harmony.
constraints: SINGLE SUBJECT, узнаваемость оригинала ВАЖНЕЕ художественности — не добавляй рамки/орнаменты/декор чужих стилей вокруг мема
сохраняй нарочитую простоту/кривизну оригинала если она часть мема (не облагораживать)
субъект крупно по центру, чистый хромакей по всем краям
если у мема есть каноничный вид — держись его, а не общей 'красивой' интерпретации
для аниме-мемов — обязателен референс персонажа (character_ref), для интернет-мемов — точное каноничное описание оригинала в теме

styles.essence: The whole print is rendered as a Byzantine gold-ground wall mosaic / icon: the entire image — figure and background — is assembled from countless small square glass tesserae with visible grout seams and a thin dark contour tracing each shape, every colour field tiled in flat mosaic blocks with no soft shading and no perspective. A solid shimmering GOLD smalti ground fills the whole background in staggered brick-laid golden squares catching light unevenly, with a large circular gold halo of radiating tesserae set behind the figure's head. The figure stands frontal and hieratic like an icon saint, calm and solemn. A rectangular decorative frame of interlocking geometric mosaic bands (a running guilloche of two contrasting tesserae between thin fillets) borders the composition.
styles.text_treatment: Main phrase set exactly once in a solemn wide Roman-capital form, the letters themselves built from small dark-red and deep-blue tesserae with a thin gold-grout outline so the lettering reads as inlaid mosaic, placed as a single horizontal line in the lower gold field above the bottom mosaic border. Vertical kanji/katakana name column tiled from pale silver-white tesserae against the gold ground, placed outside the figure's silhouette in the inner frame field.
styles.palette_rule: Shimmering gold ground + pearl silver-white + charcoal black + cream ivory + two accent tesserae colours (deep lapis blue / dark red) for lettering and borders. Gold always dominates.
constraints: SINGLE FIGURE, строго фронтальный иконный вид
вся плоскость набрана из квадратных тессер со швами затирки — фон, фигура И текст
золотой мозаичный фон обязателен + круглый нимб за головой
мин. кегль главной строки 0.08-0.10
обычно chroma=green (золото/серебро/чёрный без зелени) — проверять индивидуально

styles.essence: A retro pop-art comic panel in the Lichtenstein manner: the figure is drawn as a dramatic bust or half-figure with thick bold black ink outlines and flat bright primary colours, modelled with visible Ben-Day halftone dots. The panel background is a flat saturated field broken by a regular halftone dot-screen (classic comic colour). A rectangular caption box sits in one upper corner carrying one short scene-setting line, and a speech bubble with a tail carries one short line of dialogue. A bold comic-panel border frames the composition.
styles.text_treatment: Dialogue set exactly once inside a white speech bubble with a thick black outline and a tail pointing at the figure, in a bold comic hand-lettered caps face, solid black fill. A short caption line sits once in a small rectangular caption box (flat colour with a thin border) in an upper corner. Vertical kanji/katakana name column as a small vertical tag near a lower corner, outside the figure. Keep both texts short and real (not imitation) so they read cleanly.
styles.palette_rule: Flat bright comic primaries (yellow / red / blue) + thick black ink + white bubble; Ben-Day halftone dots in one accent colour over the background field.
constraints: толстый чёрный контур + бен-дэй точки обязательны
ровно ОДИН речевой пузырь + ОДНА caption-плашка, обе с коротким реальным текстом
SINGLE FIGURE, бюст или полуфигура
мин. кегль реплики в пузыре 0.05-0.07

styles.essence: An energetic silk-screen concert gig-poster / tour poster: the figure is the poster hero, drawn in bold graphic screenprint style with thick outlines, set against a burst of radiating sunburst rays and scattered sparkle-stars in a limited punchy palette with light halftone grain. A big bold band-name wordmark lockup dominates the top, a smaller event / 'WORLD TOUR' line sits in a banner-bar beneath it, and a small decorative tour-date list or barcode strip anchors a bottom corner as fine print.
styles.text_treatment: Band-name wordmark set exactly once, large and bold across the top in a heavy poster display face (arched or slab), one flat fill with a thin keyline. Secondary event line ('WORLD TOUR' etc.) set once in a filled banner-bar directly beneath it. Vertical kanji/katakana name as a small vertical tag in a lower corner. The bottom tour-date list / barcode is DECORATIVE fine print — thin placeholder strokes suggesting text, never real readable words.
styles.palette_rule: Two-to-three punchy screenprint spot colours (hot pink / golden-yellow / teal) + black outlines + cream, high energy, visible halftone grain.
constraints: SINGLE FIGURE как постерный герой + лучи/звёзды позади
главный band-name крупно сверху + event-строка — читаемые; даты/мелочь внизу — декоративная имитация без реальных слов
мин. кегль band-name 0.12-0.16
chroma green по умолчанию — проверять зелёные лучи фона

styles.essence: A collegiate athletic varsity print where the TYPOGRAPHY is the hero, not a full illustration: a GIANT central number dominates the composition (bold collegiate block numerals with a felt-patch / twill-applique look — layered outline and drop-stitch edge), the character's name set in an arched collegiate wordmark above it, and a small round crest-patch emblem of the character (head plus signature prop) placed between the name and the number. A few small star or accent marks are scattered around. The figure appears only minimal / emblematic inside the crest-patch — the athletic lettering and number carry the print.
styles.text_treatment: Character name set exactly once as an arched collegiate block wordmark across the top (varsity serif/block face, layered twill-patch fill with an outline). The giant number is centered below in the same twill-patch treatment as the single largest element. Vertical kanji/katakana name as a small vertical accent beside the number. A small arched 'athletic tagline' at the very bottom is DECORATIVE fine print, not real words.
styles.palette_rule: Two-tone collegiate athletic palette (cream + one strong team colour) + gold or black outline trim, felt-patch texture; flat, no gradients.
constraints: ГИГАНТСКИЙ номер + имя дугой = главные элементы (типографика-герой), фигура — минимальная эмблема-патч
twill/felt-патч фактура у букв и номера
ровно ОДНА crest-эмблема персонажа
мин. кегль номера 0.35-0.5 ширины кадра
chroma green по умолчанию

styles.essence: A bootleg anime magazine-cover / weeb streetwear zine layout with ALL elements floating on a clean flat chroma-key background (NO filled paper rectangle or box behind them — the print sits directly on the bare garment fabric, like the reference tees where the white is the shirt itself): a single anime character is the cover hero, drawn as a DETAILED retro-anime illustration with soft cel-and-gradient shading, fine confident linework and glossy highlights (1990s-2000s OVA / vintage manga-cover rendering, NOT flat modern sticker-vector). Frame the hero to MATCH the character's temperament: for a composed, serious, elegant, cool or non-combat character, use a calm HEAD-AND-SHOULDERS BUST PORTRAIT facing the viewer that fills most of the frame (like a real anime magazine cover portrait), face and gaze forward, minimal or no weapon; for an energetic, aggressive, combat or action character, use a dramatic three-quarter or dynamic pose gripping their signature weapon. Either way hair and effects sweep across the layout. A HUGE stylised retro KATAKANA title wordmark dominates the upper area — chunky angular katakana with a bold outline and an inner highlight streak, slight italic energy — this fake 'magazine name' is the single largest graphic element. A tiny issue marker (a small kanji-plus-number tag like a year or number) sits beside the title. Scattered faux-Japanese cover typography surrounds the figure: a few small katakana/kanji labels, one short block of tiny Japanese flavour text, and two or three short lines of deadpan ironic ENGLISH cover-lines (weeb humour). A bold VERTICAL kanji column runs down one side reading a seasonal or thematic phrase, punctuated by a big '!!'. A little cluster of small circular and heart-shaped kanji charm-seal stamps (omamori style) sits in the lower area, and one large single decorative kanji chop-seal accents a lower corner. The artwork itself carries a vintage finish: a light halftone dot screen in the shading and gently faded, muted retro inks, like an old screen-printed manga page — but this treatment lives ON the elements only, there is NO paper background behind them. Slightly imperfect, hand-assembled bootleg charm. NO real-world brand or band wordmark anywhere — the katakana title itself is the only wordmark.
styles.text_treatment: The big katakana title = the character's name transliterated into katakana (or a punchy katakana phrase), rendered once as a chunky outlined retro wordmark across the top, the largest text by far. Two or three short ironic English cover-lines set small and stacked in the left margin, condensed all-caps sans, plain fill. The vertical kanji seasonal column plus one bold '!!'. The circular and heart charm-seal kanji clusters and the big corner kanji chop are DECORATIVE short kanji (may be loose or imperfect, that is authentic to the genre) — never overlapping the face. Keep exactly one giant title plus a light scattering of small accents; do NOT flood the layout or repeat the title. SHIRT-NEUTRAL TEXT COLOUR (important, owner rule): every text element — the katakana title, the English cover-lines, the vertical kanji column, the charm-seals and the bottom quote — must stay legible on BOTH a black and a white shirt from the same single print. So render all lettering in a NEUTRAL MID-TONE (mid grey) or the single accent colour, ALWAYS with a thick contrasting keyline/outline (a light outline when the fill is dark, a dark outline when the fill is light). NEVER use pure-black-only text and NEVER pure-white-only text without an outline — pure black vanishes on a black garment and pure white vanishes on a white garment.
styles.palette_rule: NO background field — elements sit on a clean flat chroma so the print goes straight onto the shirt fabric. ONE muted, slightly-faded retro accent colour carrying the whole design (dusty crimson is the default; a faded pastel two-tone is an alt) + black ink line art, with a light halftone-dot screen in the shading; strict monochromatic discipline, faded-vintage over clean-saturated. A full high-contrast black-and-white manga-halftone variant (no colour, Ben-Day dot shading, gothic-tribal display lettering) is also valid for darker themes.
constraints: SINGLE anime FIGURE как обложечный герой, ДЕТАЛЬНАЯ ретро-аниме прорисовка с мягкими градиентами (не плоский вектор), по character_ref если персонаж известен
винтаж-подача на САМИХ элементах: халфтон в тенях + приглушённые/выцветшие краски + детальная ретро-манга прорисовка (НЕ через бумажный фон)

БЕЗ фонового прямоугольника/бумаги/рамки-подложки: только элементы (персонаж + катакана-заголовок + текст + вороны + печати) на ЧИСТОМ плоском хромакее по всей площади — принт садится прямо на ткань футболки
руки/кисти анатомически верные: ровно 5 пальцев, читаемый жест (при риске сложной кисти — упростить позу)
ровно ОДИН огромный катакана-заголовок сверху = крупнейший элемент; НИКАКИХ реальных брендов/лого/названий групп
монохром: один акцентный цвет + чёрный на кремовом (или ч/б халфтон-вариант) — без радуги
японские акценты (вертикальная колонка, шармы-печати, угловой иероглиф-чоп) — декоративные, вне лица

ЗАПРЕЩЕНА свастика и символ 卍 (мандзи) в ЛЮБОМ виде — читается как свастика, блокируется на маркетплейсах и оскорбителен; если термин требует 卍 (напр. Банкай 卍解), писать ТОЛЬКО катаканой バンカイ или латиницей BANKAI, символ 卍 не рисовать. Также никакой иной ненавистнической/экстремистской символики

ВЕСЬ ТЕКСТ легибелен и на ЧЁРНОЙ, и на БЕЛОЙ футболке из одного принта: нейтральный средний тон (серый) ИЛИ акцентный цвет + жирный КОНТРАСТНЫЙ контур; НИКОГДА не чисто-чёрный без контура и не чисто-белый без контура (пропадёт на футболке того же цвета)
PG для маркетплейса: без откровенного фансервиса
чистое плоское хромакей-поле по всем краям под вырезку
ANATOMY: точное число конечностей и пальцев
